title: Cross Board Duplication of Items and Subitems
excerpt:
I would like the ability to duplicate an item (with or without its subitems) to another board. I would also like the ability to do this in an automation.

posts.author: Vertex45 (Joe Serio)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to duplicate an item (with or without its subitems) to another board. I would also like the ability to do this in an automation.

“When this happens, duplicate item in another board and connect boards”

posts.author: Steven777 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Had same issue here.

When Sub-Item created, Then Create Item in another Board and Link them. Feature requests
When Creating a “Sub-Item” on Board A Then Create an “Item” on Board B Link them in Both Boards (A&B), under a Linked Column. However the link gets created on the column of the mother “Item” of Board A, and not its “Sub-Item”. Which defeats the purpose of linking SubItem and Item of the different boards. Need help with this ASAP. Please push the Vote button. [Screenshot 2024-11-15 141141] [Screenshot 2024-11-15 161349]

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Steven777,

I replied in your original post.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Vertex45 ,

Yes - this is possible with the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

Mirror Item allows you to add the same item + subitems with updates+replies included to multiple boards, and keep them in sync.

No need to setup complex automations or workflows.

It’s pretty simple to do with our app.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co or book a meeting with us here
